title: Two-Band Lattice Weyl Model
summary: A simple periodic two-band lattice Hamiltonian provides an explicit realization of Weyl nodes on a Brillouin torus and makes the global doubling constraint visible.
assumptions: A minimal two-band effective description is sufficient.
regime: Explicit lattice regularization of point-node band structure.
scope: Lecture One simple examples of periodic band Hamiltonians.

source_anchors.notes: Lecture One gives an explicit periodic Weyl Hamiltonian on the lattice.

representation: Periodic Bloch Hamiltonian on a Brillouin torus.
failure_modes: A local continuum toy model is not enough to see the torus-level doubling constraint.
retrieval_hints: Use when an explicit lattice regularization is needed.
